goal: Add a side-effect-free receipt record preflight builder that validates cockpit patch consume execution receipt authority is ready for later receipt recording while keeping permit consume, receipt recording, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, record receipts, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready cockpit patch consume execution receipt authority can be preflighted for later receipt recording without applying it.
Receipt record ref, recorder ref, and record policy ref are required.
Receipt recording and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual receipt recording and patch application require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing record ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, receipt recording, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-143 authorized cockpit patch consume execution receipt without recording it.
